Flow ACE is a glider dedicated to beginner pilots and those who want stress free flying. In order to accomplish maximum safety in all possible flight configurations, ACE went through strict procedures and received the EN A homologation in all sizes with excellent results.

With its easy inflation and accessibility ACE is very forgiving to fly and has the easy characteristics typical of an EN-A glider. In-flight ACE has a smooth feel and is very stable in both pitch and roll, making it very comfortable and safe.

We have trimmed the ACE to be a glider that can give the right amount of feedback, as this is vital if you want to know what the air is doing around you.

The key qualities of the ACE:

  • Confidence inspiring stability and safety combined with a level of feedback that allows you to learn about the air you are flying in.
  • Significant increase in brake pressure as you approach the stall point.
  • Constant feedback of pleasure/ pressure.
  • Colour-coded risers and lines.
  • High quality and durable materials.

excerpt.rendered: TECHNICAL DATA COLOURS DOWNLOADS Flow ACE is a glider dedicated to beginner pilots and those who want stress free flying. In order to accomplish maximum safety in all possible flight configurations, ACE went through strict procedures and received the EN A homologation in all sizes with excellent results. With its easy inflation and accessibility ACE […]
